headline: Ugg Brand Owner Deckers Outdoor Corp. Loses Patent Case Against Quince
summary: After a four-day trial, a federal jury invalidated the design patent Deckers Outdoor Corp. had for its Ugg Ultra Mini Boot, giving Quince the win.
